rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) property tax homestead exemptions. Gov't Code §2306.142 governs single-family mortgage revenue bond issuance by the housing department. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative overlap.
quote: Sec. 2306.142. AUTHORIZATION OF BONDS. (a) Subject to the requirements of this section, the board shall authorize all bonds issued by the department.
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses mortgage revenue bond authorization, not property tax homestead exemptions.
